basic_details.job_title: NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Kurukshetra. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: Upper age limit relaxed by up to 5 years for SC/ST/Women and Physically handicapped candidates; up to 3 years for OBC NCL candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Full-time B.Tech/B.E. (Mechanical Engineering) and full-time M.Tech/M.E. (Mechanical Engineering, preferably Machine Design specialization) from a recognized institute/university with at least 60% marks or at least 6.5/10 CPI or CGPA. GATE qualified preferred.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Full-time B.Tech/B.E. (Mechanical Engineering) and full-time M.Tech/M.E. (Mechanical Engineering, preferably Machine Design specialization) from a recognized institute/university with at least 60% marks or at least 6.5/10 CPI or CGPA. GATE qualified preferred. Preference for FEA analysis/topology optimization experience or SCI/SCIE journal paper.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): INR 37,000+HRA (1st and 2nd Year), INR 42,000+HRA (3rd Year upon upgradation to SRF)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Kurukshetra to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Kurukshetra Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Full-time B.Tech/B.E. (Mechanical Engineering) and full-time M.Tech/M.E. (Mechanical Engineering, preferably Machine Design specialization) from a recognized institute/university with at least 60% marks or at least 6.5/10 CPI or CGPA. GATE qualified preferred. Preference for FEA analysis/topology optimization experience or SCI/SCIE journal paper.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: Upper age limit relaxed by up to 5 years for SC/ST/Women and Physically handicapped candidates; up to 3 years for OBC NCL candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): INR 37,000+HRA (1st and 2nd Year), INR 42,000+HRA (3rd Year upon upgradation to SRF)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Kurukshetra to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Kurukshetra JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at NIT Kurukshetra is 26 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in the NIT Kurukshetra recruitment drive. This is a contractual position for a specific project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Kurukshetra JRF Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 is Online. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JRF post at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at NIT Kurukshetra is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/Women/Physically handicapped and OBC NCL candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The salary for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at NIT Kurukshetra is INR 37,000+HRA for the 1st and 2nd year, and INR 42,000+HRA for the 3rd year upon upgradation to SRF.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for JRF?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a full-time B.Tech/B.E. (Mechanical Engineering) and M.Tech/M.E. (Mechanical Engineering, preferably Machine Design specialization) with at least 60% marks or 6.5/10 CPI/CGPA. GATE qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NIT Kurukshetra JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the NIT Kurukshetra Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment for any category, including General/OBC and SC/ST candidates. The application is free.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Kurukshetra primarily involves an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NIT Kurukshetra JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for NIT Kurukshetra JRF Recruitment 2026 can be found on the official website of NIT Kurukshetra. A direct link to the notification PDF is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The official website for National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) is https://www.nitkkr.ac.in. Candidates can visit this website for more details and to apply online.
